title: STDIO, Streamable HTTP, Lifecycle, and Deployment · Extension Lens: Streamable Http
summary: Choose and configure a transport for local and remote MCP servers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext streamable http increment in a local and remote transport deployment plan. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Implement remote Streamable HTTP with correct routing, content types, and transport security.
Implement newline-safe STDIO transport without logging protocol noise to standard output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
